scope: prints and case posts produced by the 07:20Z aggregator fallback cycle only. this does not withdraw the names themselves: real-pool prints for these symbols before and after the window, and every graded record built from real pools, stand as written.
note: three case posts withdrawn 2026-07-21: one aggregator cycle printed broken numbers (a dust pool dressed as depth, a mixed-quote price). the files were struck the same evening and the correction posted on X. the seals stand as written; this ledger marks the claims so no checker ever stamps them ok.
revised: 2026-07-22: window corrected from 2026-07-20T21:30-23:30Z (a timezone error in the first entry) to the actual cycle window above, and scope added. the ledger corrects itself in public, like everything else here.
